title: How would you best decribe Asuka Langley Soryu
display_title: How would you best decribe Asuka Langley Soryu
wikitext:
[]: How would you best decribe Asuka Langley Soryu?             Quote Post by offthechainjoe » Fri Jul 17, 2009 10:52 pm How would you best describe Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:03 pm One who hides the shame of her childhood using Eva piloting as her only identity. In b4 bitch

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:07 pm bitch edit: damn I was beaten

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:12 pm She needs help. (Who doesn't in this series?) That's why I feel for her. I want to see another character reach out to her and help her, but it never happens. So she tries to help herself, but goes about it all wrong. Hence why she remains, in people's minds, a bitch.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:22 pm A cut red head who is a total brat.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:27 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: A cut red head who is a total brat.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:30 pm A hot headed bitch with a past no girl should have to have. Plus, she's hot and entertaining.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:44 pm "Because she was a bitch?" teacher writes: Because she was.....a bitch. (Robot chicken, couldn't find the sketch on YT)

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 17, 2009 11:45 pm Fast Tony DeNiro wrote: Asuka is my favorite character in the series. She desperately wants respect and to be noticed, and she aggressively goes about forcing people to give her what she wants. But in doing so, she completely destroys any chance at getting close to anyone, which is another thing she wants. Just a completely flawed character, but so perfectly done.

[]:             Quote Post by Psychotronic » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:21 am Loud and tsundere. That is, until that whole Arael thing happened...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:23 am Asuka is like an attention whore.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:26 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Asuka is an attention whore.

[]:             Quote Post by Psychotronic » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:29 am Fast Tony DeNiro wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Asuka is a(n) (attention) whore.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:35 am Psychotronic wrote: Fast Tony DeNiro wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Asuka is a(n) (attention) whore.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jul 18, 2009 12:39 am Fast Tony DeNiro wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Asuka is an attention whore.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Sat Jul 18, 2009 3:52 am Asuka= A WESOME S PECIAL U NIQUE K ICKASS A DORABLE Asuka is simply the reincarnation of AWESOME (i already said that once but my oppinion still hasn't changed) all the people who say she is a bitch don't know shit 'bout her character, and by the way, she is no bitch at all, she is bitchy, there is a differnce. and all that bitchy and though behaviour, i love it about her... I LOVE Asuka !

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:14 am a bitch. (yes its already been said but whatever :P)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 18, 2009 8:18 am A warrior-noble A lonely girl in need of a hug from someone who wouldn't condescend to her. A walking ball of frustration because normal people are so stupid!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 18, 2009 9:13 am An intelligent but immature young girl with trauma-induced feelings of inadequacy, her denial of this weakness manifests as a persona rife with hubris that sabotages her every attempt at meaningful interpersonal connection.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Sat Jul 18, 2009 11:56 am My Goddes! My little Girl! My favorite Anime Character Ever! Shinji Dont deserve her Hmp!
